vocab.example: We will give a demo of the new feature this afternoon.
vocab.example_vi: Chiều nay chúng tôi sẽ trình diễn tính năng mới.

vocab.example: Please speak slowly so the audience can follow.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng nói chậm để khán giả theo kịp.

vocab.example: The main highlight is the new search function.
vocab.example_vi: Điểm nổi bật chính là chức năng tìm kiếm mới.

vocab.example: We redesigned the interface to be simpler.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi đã thiết kế lại giao diện đơn giản hơn.

vocab.example: This is still a prototype, not the final version.
vocab.example_vi: Đây vẫn là bản mẫu thử nghiệm, chưa phải phiên bản cuối.

vocab.example: Let me give you a quick walkthrough of the app.
vocab.example_vi: Để tôi hướng dẫn nhanh từng bước sử dụng ứng dụng.

vocab.example: The demo looked really impressive to the clients.
vocab.example_vi: Buổi demo trông rất ấn tượng với khách hàng.

vocab.example: We will have a question and answer session at the end.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta sẽ có phần hỏi đáp vào cuối buổi.

listening.title: Demo day for the new dashboard

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: Good afternoon everyone. Today we will give a demo of the new dashboard.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: Linh will do the walkthrough. She built most of the interface.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Thanks, Nam. Let me start with the main highlight — the new search function.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: This is still a prototype, but you can already try the search bar here.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: This looks really impressive! How long did it take to build?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: About two weeks. We focused on making the interface simple for the audience.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: Great work. Let's open the question and answer session now.

questions.q: Who does the walkthrough of the dashboard?
What is the main highlight of the demo?
How long did it take to build the prototype?

shadowing: Today we will give a demo of the new dashboard.
Let me start with the main highlight of this feature.
This is still a prototype, not the final version.
We focused on making the interface simple for the audience.
Let's open the question and answer session now.

interview.question: Tell me about a time you presented a project to a group of people.
tips_vi: Nêu bối cảnh: đối tượng nghe là ai, mục tiêu buổi trình bày
Nhấn mạnh cách bạn chuẩn bị và xử lý câu hỏi khó
Kết thúc bằng kết quả hoặc phản hồi nhận được
interview.sample_answer: Last month, I presented a demo of our new dashboard to the whole company. I prepared by practicing my walkthrough several times and thinking about possible questions from the audience. During the presentation, I highlighted the new search function and explained it in simple language, since not everyone was technical. After the demo, there was a question and answer session, and I answered calmly even for difficult questions. The feedback was very positive, and my manager said it was clear and easy to follow.

interview.question: How do you prepare for a technical presentation?
tips_vi: Nêu các bước chuẩn bị: nội dung, luyện tập, dự đoán câu hỏi
Nhấn mạnh việc điều chỉnh ngôn ngữ theo đối tượng nghe
Có thể nhắc đến việc chuẩn bị bản demo dự phòng
interview.sample_answer: First, I think about who my audience is, so I can choose the right level of detail. If they are not technical, I avoid difficult words and focus on the benefits instead. Then I prepare a simple structure: introduction, main highlights, a live walkthrough, and time for questions. I always practice at least once before the real presentation, and I prepare a backup plan in case the demo has a technical problem. This preparation makes me feel more confident.
